LanguageData.FB_SymbioHeadRegrowthPaused: Regrowth paused to preserve the {0} hemogel safety reserve.
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHeadRegrowthPausedNoSupply: Regrowth paused: the hemogel network lacks full supply.
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHeadRegrowthAwaitingSpace: Symbiotic head ready: waiting for adjacent space.
